text:
Peyton Watson, Nuggets remain apart in contract negotiations, per @sam_amick.

Nuggets intend to match any offer sheet for Watson, but they are also open to sign-and-trade offers.
@sam_amick https://t.co/bqJ0vQuVn9
Shams: Quinten Post to sign a 3-year, $30M offer sheet with the Grizzlies.
Warriors will have until 11:59pm ET on Tuesday to match. https://t.co/EoHwFk4yzb

Shams: Kawhi Leonard has hired a new agent to oversee extension talks with Raptors.

"[Leonard] previously had Mitch Frankel and his uncle and business adviser Dennis Robertson handle all of his affairs."
Mikel Brown: Will play Monday https://t.co/1cqrv7SbQL

Lakers called Rich Paul a week before free agency to arrange a videoconference with LeBron James.

LeBron "wasn't available" because he'd already decided he didn't want to return to the team.

(via @ramonashelburne)

Giannis Antetokounmpo when asked who the GOAT is:

"The person I like to watch a lot is LeBron James."

https://t.co/rgecyNL3sa
Shams: Rui Hachimura to sign a 2-year, $28M deal with the Clippers.

Rui Hachimura in 2026 playoffs:

17.5 PPG
3.3 3PG
56.9% 3PT

Hachimura has the highest career playoff 3P% in NBA history (51.6%). https://t.co/PwsbdWVClw
Rui Hachimura: Signs with LAC https://t.co/WcK5TxnQSJ

Lakers offseason so far:

In:
Walker Kessler
Sandro Mamukelashvili
Quentin Grimes
Collin Sexton
Jaden Hardy
Cameron Carr

Out:
LeBron James
Rui Hachimura
Deandre Ayton
Marcus Smart
Luke Kennard
Jaxson Hayes

And brought back Austin Reaves. https://t.co/MQkT1NeSEK
Fischer: Rui Hachimura deal doesn't rule out Clippers from sign-and-trade pursuit of Peyton Watson. https://t.co/uA3EhuabYT

Lakers potential depth chart:

PG - Doncic, Sexton, Hardy, Bronny
SG - Grimes, Carr, Knecht
SF - Reaves, LaRavia, Thiero
PF - Mamukelashvili, Vanderbilit
C - Kessler
Rui Hachimura was "on the Luka Doncic preferred return list," per @LawMurrayTheNU.
Shams: Suns CEO Josh Bartelstein finalizing new contract extension.
Stein: Rui Hachimura prioritized staying in Los Angeles; chose Clippers despite interest from Nets, Mavs, Warriors, Wolves.

Giannis Antetokounmpo after seeing fake reports that LeBron signed with the Cavs:

"Touch my heart bro. Don't do that to me. Give me a heart attack."

"Ahhh... There is a chance!"

https://t.co/3MTaih5h4d

Brian Windhorst on conversations he's had regarding LeBron James:

"Everybody I talk to is like, 'We're afraid it's Cleveland.' Nobody seems like they have optimism to be honest."

https://t.co/KUxpzfJcBP
Giannis Antetokounmpo thanks Milwaukee: https://t.co/bad2jVyNmJ

Shams: DeMar DeRozan to be waived by the Kings.
DeMar DeRozan: Waived by Kings https://t.co/SeGmRT73yg

Brad Stevens on the Jaylen Brown trade:

"When I looked at our team, and I looked at where the league was heading ... the path looked a little bit more challenging with 70% of our cap and such a high percent of our usage tied into two players." https://t.co/ov07tdErQH

Brad Stevens on what input Jayson Tatum had in the Jaylen Brown trade:

"None. I have a real hard-and-fast rule that I don't ask guys about other guys." https://t.co/VSg8aaRkBq

Nikola Jokic: 

"My idea is to sign next summer and stay with Denver for the rest of my career."

(via @LjubomirovicM)

Brad Stevens on Jaylen Brown feeling disrespected by the trade process:

"I'm hopeful we can sit down and talk about that at some point, but I'm sorry that he feels that way."

(via @eringrugan)
https://t.co/sIQtqLN4Jm
Jokic can add another year of max money to his deal — worth approximately $80M — by waiting until next summer, per @sam_amick. https://t.co/dW5N2FY9Qj

Jim Paschke to Giannis Antetokounmpo:

"I would say that you could always come home."

Giannis:

"That would be awesome …  Kevin Garnett did the same thing … and people to this day love him. Some people don't always feel—"

Paschke:

"They always will."

Jalen Brunson to rehab for at least 2 months after undergoing surgery to repair injury in right forearm/wrist area, per @IanBegley.
Jalen Brunson: To undergo surgery Tuesday https://t.co/j5O4dBnXwI
Update: surgery is to Brunson's left wrist, per @ShamsCharania.

26.5 PPG
7.0 APG
3.5 3PG
52.8% FG
43.8% 3PT

Bucks get - Caris LeVert, two second-round picks
Pistons get - Taurean Prince, Gary Harris

Shams on Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown's off-court relationship:

"On the court, they were great. But over the last year or so, that personal relationship, it was as close to not existent as you could have."

https://t.co/XiRNmKYpuR

Jaylen Brown on being traded from the Celtics to the Sixers:

"It's still weird now. My brain is like, Philly? Of all places, like... why would you do that?"

https://t.co/EgenHi9fmr

Shams: Khris Middleton to sign a 3-year, $17.6M deal with the Wizards via sign-and-trade.

Shams: Mavs will send Khris Middleton to the Wizards via sign-and-trade as part of 6-team deal that also includes the Clippers, Pistons, Bucks, and Grizzlies.

The move involves previously agreed upon deals.
Khris Middleton: Returning to Washington https://t.co/3QxXuAN2QP
Shams: D'Angelo Russell to be traded to the Grizzlies as part of Khris Middleton deal.

Warriors decline to match Grizzlies' 3-year, $30M offer sheet for Quinten Post.
Shams: Larry Nance Jr. to sign a 1-year, $4M deal with the Pacers.

Official 6-team trade summary:

Mavs get - Santi Aldama, Marcus Sasser, Tarik Biberovic

Pistons get - John Collins, Gary Harris, Taurean Prince, 3 second-round picks

Grizzlies get - Isaiah Stewart, D'Angelo Russell, AJ Johnson, 1 first-round pick (top-20 protected via DAL), 3 https://t.co/kHnoGpwG8h

Jonas Valanciunas to be waived by the Nuggets, per @MikeAScotto.
